

/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__PRS_OrderReport ADD
	Footer17 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer27 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer37 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer41 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer42 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer43 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer44 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer45 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer46 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer47 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer51 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer52 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer53 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer54 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer55 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer56 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer57 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer61 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer62 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer63 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer64 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer65 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer66 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer67 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer71 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer72 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer73 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer74 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer75 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer76 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer77 nvarchar(500) NULL
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__PRS_OrderReport SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
